items.title: Seamless updates on next start
items.text: Updates now install themselves the next time you open BubblR Trainer — during the splash it swaps in the new build and relaunches once, with no dialog and no restart prompt (Krita-style). There's still an optional "Install now" button if you don't want to wait.

items.title: Background images & smarter export summary
items.text: Turn on "Export empty pages as background images" (Settings → Storage) to export pages with no boxes as YOLO negatives — this reduces false detections. The export summary now counts negatives, warns about classes with no examples and flags badly imbalanced classes.

items.title: Automatic updates
items.text: BubblR Trainer checks for updates on start and downloads a new version in the background automatically. Turn it off under Settings → Display.

items.title: Custom classes & YOLO export
items.text: Define your own detection classes (Settings → Classes), import them from a classes.txt / data.yaml, and export classes.txt + data.yaml with an optional train/val split — train any object detector, not just manga bubbles.
